feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: API for creating Communication Management
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Is there an opportunity in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to create a Communication User, Communication System, or Communication Arrangement using APIs or classes?
I only found APIs for reading on https://api.sap.com/, but I need creation.

BR,
Oleg Vokh

entry.title: Hello,I want to show the "Text" field in Goods Movement Analysis from Post Goods Movement.
entry.content:
Althouht the value of this field carry from logic, don`t show in the Goods Movement Analysis report.

Could you please guide me how to show custom field value in the report?

entry.title: Clear incoming payments with api
entry.content:
Hello experts,

With the api, I want to create incoming payments as from "Post Incoming Payments" app. In that "Post Incoming Payments" app, we have to add the JE we want to clear and the GL account and the amount.

I found Journal Entry - Clearing (Asynchronous) API can create data in Post Incoming Payments. But that api does not have field for debit amount and credit amount.  How can I create the Post Incoming Payments adding debit amount or credit amount. 

API #S4 hana #Post Incoming payments

entry.title: Send Test Mail in Monitor Email Transmission app
entry.content:
I want to send mail from s4hana system.

When I click Send Test Mail button in Monitor Email Transmission app, email status is sent but the emails are not reachable to outlook. Please help me to solve this issue.

This is the status code of mail.

 

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: How to Send SOAP Requests in SAP CAP: S/4HANA Cloud WSDLs vs. External SOAP Services
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working on a project using the SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) model and I need to integrate SOAP-based services. I understand that there are two main ways to send SOAP requests in SAP CAP:

  1. Using SOAP WSDLs from S/4HANA Cloud: I know that S/4HANA Cloud provides SOAP WSDLs for various services, but I need more details on how to set up and consume these services within a CAP project. What are the best practices for integrating these WSDLs? Are there any specific configurations or libraries I should be aware of?

  2. Consuming External SOAP Services: Apart from S/4HANA Cloud, I also need to consume external SOAP services. What are the key differences and additional considerations when integrating external SOAP services into a CAP project? Are there any particular challenges or recommended tools for this?

I am looking for detailed guidance, including code snippets, configuration steps, and any potential pitfalls to avoid. Any examples or documentation would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your help in advance!

entry.title: S4HC CDS view on Supplier that I can filter on Industry
entry.content:
We are on S4HC Public Cloud.

The "Manage Supplier Master screen" for some of our suppliers has had Industries maintained.   I need a CDS view on Supplier that I can filter on Industry.  I have checked I_Supplier and created a custom CDS view of it and although this has Industry on a number of elements none of them show the values that can be seen in the "Manage Supplier Master screen".

I reason that we need this custom CDS view is that we want to expose via API, data that is associated with particular industry Suppliers.

See the Manage Suppler Master screen

And into the details of that Supplier – notice that the Industries are set to 10 and 21.

I had created a custom CDS view that is looking at I_SUPPLIERS and there does not appear to be any element that corresponds to the above Industries.   There are ½ dozen other Industry elements but these are all blank.

Another screen access via the Supplier List shows a Industry but there no way to edit this – even if there was I would not know if I could use that information in a CDS view anyway.

entry.title: Integrate Jira with SAP CPI - Create Jira ticket via SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to integrate with the Jira to create a ticket/issue via SAP CPI to reduce the usage of the third part tool which does the same thing. 

I have referred the below blogs and tried to create a sample IFlow in the sap cpi but unfortunately, I am unable to proceed further due to the error encountered which states as below. 

The Jira Cloud platform REST API (atlassian.com)

org.apache.camel.component.ahc.AhcOperationFailedException: HTTP operation failed invoking https://<hostname>/rest/api/2/issue/ with statusCode: 415

FYI, I am able to get the details of the existing ticket but unable to create the ticket via CPI. But managed to create the ticket via POSTMAN.

Sample IFLow.

 

Payload used:

{
"fields": {
"project": {
"key": "SDC"
},
"summary": "Demo ticket from the CPI via API",
"issuetype": {
"name": "Task"
},
"description": "PLEASE IGNORE THIS ISSUE TICKET",
"assignee": {
"name": "Imran"
},
"labels": [
"Demo"
]
}
}

Please advice on this. Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Disable Object Page in List Report Developed in SAP Cloud Abap Development Enviornment
entry.content:
I have created a list report page on the first page it shows data in tabular format, but when I click on any of the lines it takes me to the inside object page but I don't need an object page in this report. 

How can I achieve this using Eclipse abap development?

I really appreciate any help you can provide. 

Screenshot's are attached below.

entry.title: How to create custom preconditions and functions for Sales Order Approval Workflow
entry.content:
I need to configure approval workflow for sales orders with some custom requirements:

  1. How can I add a custom pre-condition? (Manage Sales Document Workflows app)
  2. How can I add a custom function for team members? (Manage Teams and Responsibilities app)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to you remove Action links in Adapt UI
entry.content:
We are trying to adapt the Fiori app Manage Sales Orders (F1873) and remove some of the Action links that show up when clicking on a sales order:

Using  key-user Adapt UI we can hide the links but the user can put them back and click on them. We tried Adaptation project in BAS, same thing, it does not remove the actions completely.

How do we remove these links? 

Thanks

entry.title: Export custom report as csv file
entry.content:
I would like to export custom report as csv file in s4hana system.

Currently, there is only 2 options to export "excel" and "pdf" in custom report.

Is there any other ways to export as csv file?

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting activity in SAP Central Business Configuration
entry.content:
I can't find Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting activity in SAP Central Business Configuration.

Please help me how to go to this activity.

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: How to add a custom tile from the Service Binding the preview link in eclipse ADT
entry.content:
In Eclipse ADT, I developed a custom business object, and created the Service Binding. The preview link in service binding is generaated and can display the app successfully (it's a simple list reporting app)

How do I have my end users access this app(e.g. by using "Custom Tiles APP") ? So far I see no options, even from https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/using-custom-tile-app-for-custom-development/qaq-p/12733154  i still do not see clear answers. Already check out the links inside it.

p.s. We use SAP S/4HANA Cloud public edition, and currently no license for SAP Business Application Studio.

Service binding preview linkApp previewSAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility  ABAP Development

entry.title: Can we read standard Change Documents in S/4HANA Cloud Public using class CL_CHDO_READ_TOOLS?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In some SAP Blog posts and SAP Notes, it's mentioned to use class CL_CHDO_READ_TOOLS to read Change Document information.

Today, I created a test class to read change documents for object EINKBELEG (Purchasing Documents) and got some exception "You are not authorized to display change documents".

I did a test by reading a Custom Change Document and the code worked perfectly.

I have read all standard documentation mentioning class CL_CHDO_READ_TOOLS, but none of the pages mention any restriction related to reading Standard Change Documents.

SAP Help - Reading Change Documents 

This is my code:

CLASS zktest2 DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.
   INTERFACES if_oo_adt_classrun.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS zktest2 IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD if_oo_adt_classrun~main.
    TRY.
        cl_chdo_read_tools=>changedocument_read(
          EXPORTING
            i_objectclass = 'EINKBELEG'
          IMPORTING
            et_cdredadd_tab = data(lt_cdredadd_tab)
          ).
      CATCH cx_root INTO DATA(lo_root).
        DATA(lv_message) = lo_root->get_text( ).
        out->write( lv_message ).
    ENDTRY.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

has anyone faced this issue?

entry.title: Abap Cloud - ATC checks
entry.content:
Hi,

We are starting our Clean Core journey, on a S/4 Hana On Premise solution, with a lot of legacy development (20 years installation).

One part of it is enforcing Abap Cloud Rules in ATC checks.

As we have a lot of legacy codes, we would like to enforce these new ATC checks only on newly created objects at first. Is this feasible ?

Thank you for your insight

entry.title: Assign reporting category in Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting
entry.content:
When I assign reporting category in Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting activity, this error occurs and can't assign.

I did not assign Country/Region when create report category and assign Country/Region in below screen. Because if i assign when create report category, this category does not appear to choose in below screen.

Kindly help me to solve this issue. Thank You.

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: Practicing Clean Core Extensibility For SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I am currently unable to access the provided exercises for "Practicing Clean Core Extensibility for SAP S4/HANA Cloud".

Each time I try to open the exercises, I encounter an internal error. (Internal error message is attached below).

For example, the following exercises (among others) could not be loaded:

  • Collect Usage Data using the ABAP Call Monitor
  • Create a UX using SAP Build Apps
  • Specify a Migration Scope using the Custom Code Migration App
  • Explore ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Objects
  • Utilize the SAP Business Accelerator Hub
  • ......

I would appreciate it if you could investigate the issue. Please let me know if there are any updates or if there is an estimated time for resolving this problem.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting activity in CBC
entry.content:
If we add new entry in Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting activity, that entity will appear in Run Statutory Reports app? 

I add text manually for Rep Entity and Reporting Entity Name. Is that also correct?

I referenced this blog.

Custom Reporting using Advance Compliance Report i... - SAP Community

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: Add custom field to F0718 - Post General Journal Entries Fiori App
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to add a custom field to the Fiori app F0718 - Post General Journal Entries using UI adaptation/In-app extensibility. We are on S/4HANA 2022 FPS02 Private Cloud.

I've created the custom field in the correct business context Accounting: Coding Block as mentioned in the app documentation

I've also enabled the custom field for the relevant OData of the app in the UIs and Reports section and published the field:

FAC_GL_DOCUMENT_POST_SRV

I can see that the field is published and is available in the backend.

However, when I open the app F0718 - Post General Journal Entries and enter the UI adaptation mode, there's no option to add this field or any custom field for that matter to the items section. I do not get the option to add a field when I click/right-click anywhere on the expanded items section.

Is there something more that needs to be done to be able to add this field to the app UI using UI adaptation for this app? Please guide.

@Jocelyn_Dart 

 

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud Communication with UK and PT tax authorities
entry.content:
I have a Brazilian customer that has two others plants, one in UK and the other in PT and needs the invoice documents to be forwarded to the tax agencies in real time, for a public project, what would be the suggestion, since the customeralready has already a system that generates invoice and communicates with the authorities. Do you suggest an API is made with a sales document in SAP that generates an invoice in the legacy system and does the latter communicate with the tax agency and return the invoice in SAP or does SAP Public delivers everything directly using DRC?

In terms of time and work, what would be the suggestion?

Remembering that it is a public project and we only have 2 months to complete.
